---
title: "CAREER Project"
author: "Connor Whalen"
date: "2024-07-12"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: readable
    highlight: textmate
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```
# Opening comments, header for the file, collection information, university affiliation, all that jazz

## Questions


### Defining Extreme Weather Events
- flood ##
- drought ##
- hurricanes ##
- tornadoes
- wildfire ##
- heatwaves
- cold snaps
- thunderstorms 
- blizzards 
- ice storms
- hail storms
- dust storms 
- landslides
- mudslides
- deposits from volcanic eruptions



## Methods

#### Install packages.
```{r package install, eval=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
install.packages("tidyverse")
install.packages("janitor")
install.packages("ggeffects")
install.packages("ggpubr")
install.packages("glmmTMB")
install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("johannesbjork/LaCroixColoR")
install.packages("patchwork")
install.packages("ggh4x")
install.packages("vistime")
install.packages("DHARMa")
```

#### Load packages.
```{r package load, echo=FALSE}
library(ggpubr)
library(ggeffects)
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(dbplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
#library(lmerTest)
library(lme4)
source("~/Desktop/UW/Dissertation/theme_ctmt.R")
library(LaCroixColoR)
library(patchwork)
library(ggh4x)
library(vistime)
library(car)
library(DHARMa)
```

#### Import dataset and assign dataframe 
species
```{r datasets and dataframe loading, echo=FALSE}
pimvig <- read.csv("~/Desktop/UW/TUBRI/data/processed/Pimephales_vigilax_processed_human_readable_UPDATED_2024.08.16.csv") %>% janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(weight_mg = as.numeric(weight_mg)) %>% 
  mutate(weight_g = (weight_mg/1000))

ictpun <- read.csv("~/Desktop/UW/TUBRI/data/processed/Ictalurus_punctatus_processed_human_readable.csv_UPDATED_2024.08.25.csv")  %>%
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(day_collected = as.integer(day_collected)) %>%
  mutate(weight_mg = as.numeric(weight_mg))%>% 
  mutate(weight_g = (weight_mg/1000))

notath <- read.csv("~/Desktop/UW/TUBRI/data/processed/Notropis_atherinoides_processed_human_readable_UPDATED_2024.08.16.csv") %>% 
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(weight_mg = as.numeric(weight_mg)) %>% 
  mutate(weight_g = (weight_mg/1000))

hybnuc <- read_csv("~/Desktop/UW/TUBRI/data/processed/Hybognathus_nuchalis_processed_human_readable_UPDATED_2024.08.01.csv") %>%
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(weight_mg = as.numeric(weight_mg)) %>% 
  mutate(weight_g = (weight_mg/1000))

pervig <- read_csv("~/Desktop/UW/TUBRI/data/processed/Percina_vigil_processed_human_readable_UPDATED_2024.08.01.csv") %>%
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(weight_mg = as.numeric(weight_mg)) %>% 
  mutate(weight_g = (weight_mg/1000))

carvel <- read_csv("~/Desktop/UW/TUBRI/data/processed/Carpiodes_velifer_processed_human_readable_UPDATED_2024.08.16.csv") %>%
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(weight_mg = as.numeric(weight_mg)) %>% 
  mutate(weight_g = (weight_mg/1000))

gamaff <- read_csv("~/Desktop/UW/TUBRI/data/processed/Gambusia_affinis_processed_human_readable_UPDATED_2024.08.17.csv") %>%
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(weight_mg = as.numeric(weight_mg)) %>% 
  mutate(weight_g = (weight_mg/1000))
```

Load full dataset
```{r datasets and dataframe loading, echo=FALSE}
full_data <- read.csv("~/Desktop/UW/TUBRI/data/processed/Full_dataset_physical_2024.09.25.csv") %>% 
  janitor::clean_names()
```

Assign each parasite type a new column
```{r}
full_data <- full_data %>%
  mutate(psite_type = case_when(
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "ACAN") ~ "acanthocephalan",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "ACANTH") ~ "acanthocephalan",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "CEST") ~ "cestode",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "CILI") ~ "ciliate",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "COPE") ~ "copepod",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "LEECH") ~ "leech",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "META") ~ "trematode",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "MONO") ~ "monogenean",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "MYX") ~ "myxozoan",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "MYXO") ~ "myxozoan",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "NEM") ~ "nematode",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "NMORPH") ~ "nematomorph",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "TREM") ~ "trematode",
    TRUE ~ NA
  ))
```

Filter by myxozoan to create category for parasite prevalence (presence absence). Make all other parasites count as parasite_abundance.
```{r}
full_data <- full_data %>%
  mutate(psite_abundance = case_when(
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "ACAN") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "ACANTH") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "CEST") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "CILI") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "COPE") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "LEECH") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "META") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "MONO") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "NEM") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "NMORPH") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "TREM") ~ psite_count,
    TRUE ~ NA
  ))

full_data <- full_data %>%
  mutate(psite_prevalence = case_when(
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "MYX") ~ 1,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "MYXO") ~ 1,
    TRUE ~ 0
  ))
```

Prep the data:
```{r}
full_data <- full_data %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(paste(year_collected, month_collected, day_collected, sep = "-"))) 

full_data <- full_data %>% 
  mutate(psite_prevalence = as.character(psite_prevalence))
```

### Add columns for extreme weather events to the full dataset

Find dates of no flood or droughts
```{r}
# 1963, 1964, 1966, 1970, 1971, 1974, 1975, 1978, 1980, 1982, 1983, 1984, 1987, 1988, 1989, 1990, 1991, 1992, 1993, 1994, 1996
# 1997, 1998, 1999, 2001, 2002, 2003, 2004

# select years to represent as controls: alternate years to turn 28 non event years in 14 to match # of years in events - make sure no controls overlap with events (+ before and after)
# 1963, 1988, 1989, 1990, 1991, 1992, 1993, 1996
# 1997, 2002, 2003, 2004

```

Find average dates of flood and drought
```{r}
average_d <- drought_flood_df %>%
  filter(str_detect(ewe_type, "drought")) %>%
  mutate(
    month = month(date),
    day = day(date)
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    average_month = mean(month),
    average_day = mean(day)
  )

 # average drought occurs on 6/17 of each year

average_f <- drought_flood_df %>%
  filter(str_detect(ewe_type, "flood")) %>%
  mutate(
    month = month(date),
    day = day(date)
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    average_month = mean(month),
    average_day = mean(day)
  )

 # average flood occurs on 7/17 of each year

# find average duration of each event

# Define date ranges for events
drought_events <- data.frame(
  start_date = as.Date(c("1967-01-01", "1976-01-01", "1981-01-01", 
                         "1985-01-01", "2000-01-01")),
  end_date = as.Date(c("1969-01-01", "1978-01-01", "1982-01-01", 
                       "1987-01-01", "2001-01-01"))
)

flood_events <- data.frame(
  start_date = as.Date(c("1965-08-27", "1972-12-01", "1979-04-01", "1995-05-08")),
  end_date = as.Date(c("1965-09-12", "1973-06-01", "1979-05-01", "1995-05-10"))
)

# Calculate durations of each event
drought_events$duration <- as.numeric(drought_events$end_date - drought_events$start_date)
flood_events$duration <- as.numeric(flood_events$end_date - flood_events$start_date)

# Calculate the average duration
average_duration_d <- mean(drought_events$duration)
average_duration_f <- mean(flood_events$duration)

# Print result
average_duration_d
 # 584 days -- 1 year, 6 months

average_duration_f
 # 57 days -- 2 months, 27 days
```


-6 month buffer on either side of hurricane events
- generate datasets for each type of weather event
```{r}
# create drought/flood dataset
drought_flood_df <- full_data %>% 
  mutate(ewe_type = case_when(
    date >= as.Date("1966-06-01") & date <= as.Date("1966-12-31") ~ "pre_drought",
    date >= as.Date("1967-01-01") & date <= as.Date("1970-01-01") ~ "drought",
    date >= as.Date("1970-01-02") & date <= as.Date("1970-06-01") ~ "post_drought",
    date >= as.Date("1975-06-01") & date <= as.Date("1975-12-31") ~ "pre_drought",
    date >= as.Date("1976-01-01") & date <= as.Date("1978-01-01") ~ "drought",
    date >= as.Date("1978-01-02") & date <= as.Date("1978-06-01") ~ "post_drought",
    date >= as.Date("1980-06-01") & date <= as.Date("1980-12-31") ~ "pre_drought",
    date >= as.Date("1981-01-01") & date <= as.Date("1982-01-01") ~ "drought",
    date >= as.Date("1982-01-02") & date <= as.Date("1982-06-01") ~ "post_drought",
    date >= as.Date("1984-06-01") & date <= as.Date("1984-12-31") ~ "pre_drought",
    date >= as.Date("1985-01-01") & date <= as.Date("1987-01-01") ~ "drought",
    date >= as.Date("1987-01-02") & date <= as.Date("1987-06-01") ~ "post_drought",
    date >= as.Date("1999-06-01") & date <= as.Date("1999-12-31") ~ "pre_drought",
    date >= as.Date("2000-01-01") & date <= as.Date("2001-01-01") ~ "drought",
    date >= as.Date("2001-01-02") & date <= as.Date("2001-06-02") ~ "post_drought",
    date >= as.Date("1965-02-26") & date <= as.Date("1965-08-26") ~ "pre_flood",
    date >= as.Date("1965-08-27") & date <= as.Date("1965-09-12") ~ "flood",
    date >= as.Date("1965-09-13") & date <= as.Date("1966-03-13") ~ "post_flood",
    date >= as.Date("1972-05-01") & date <= as.Date("1972-11-30") ~ "pre_flood",
    date >= as.Date("1972-12-01") & date <= as.Date("1973-06-01") ~ "flood",
    date >= as.Date("1973-06-02") & date <= as.Date("1973-12-02") ~ "post_flood",
    date >= as.Date("1978-10-01") & date <= as.Date("1978-03-31") ~ "pre_flood",
    date >= as.Date("1979-04-01") & date <= as.Date("1979-05-01") ~ "flood",
    date >= as.Date("1979-05-02") & date <= as.Date("1979-11-02") ~ "post_flood",
    date >= as.Date("1994-11-07") & date <= as.Date("1995-05-07") ~ "pre_flood",
    date >= as.Date("1995-05-08") & date <= as.Date("1995-05-10") ~ "flood",
    date >= as.Date("1995-05-11") & date <= as.Date("1995-11-11") ~ "post_flood",
    TRUE ~ "no event"
  ))

# create controls for the same dataset -- non events
# only calculated using the drought timeframe, because it encompasses the flood timeframe in it
drought_flood_df <- drought_flood_df %>% 
  mutate(control = case_when(
    date >= as.Date("1963-01-15") & date <= as.Date("1963-06-16") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1963-06-17") & date <= as.Date("1963-12-17") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1964-12-18") & date <= as.Date("1964-06-18") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1988-01-15") & date <= as.Date("1988-06-16") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1988-06-17") & date <= as.Date("1988-12-17") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1988-12-18") & date <= as.Date("1989-06-18") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1989-01-15") & date <= as.Date("1989-06-16") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1989-06-17") & date <= as.Date("1989-12-17") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1989-12-18") & date <= as.Date("1990-06-18") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1990-01-15") & date <= as.Date("1990-06-16") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1990-06-17") & date <= as.Date("1990-12-17") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1990-12-18") & date <= as.Date("1991-06-18") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1991-01-15") & date <= as.Date("1991-06-16") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1991-06-17") & date <= as.Date("1991-12-17") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1991-12-18") & date <= as.Date("1992-06-18") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1992-01-15") & date <= as.Date("1992-06-16") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1992-06-17") & date <= as.Date("1992-12-17") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1992-12-18") & date <= as.Date("1993-06-18") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1993-01-15") & date <= as.Date("1993-06-16") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1993-06-17") & date <= as.Date("1993-12-17") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1993-12-18") & date <= as.Date("1994-06-18") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1996-01-15") & date <= as.Date("1996-06-16") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1996-06-17") & date <= as.Date("1996-12-17") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1996-12-18") & date <= as.Date("1997-06-18") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1997-01-15") & date <= as.Date("1997-06-16") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1997-06-17") & date <= as.Date("1997-12-17") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1997-12-18") & date <= as.Date("1998-06-18") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("2002-01-15") & date <= as.Date("2002-06-16") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("2002-06-17") & date <= as.Date("2002-12-17") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("2002-12-18") & date <= as.Date("2003-06-18") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("2003-01-15") & date <= as.Date("2003-06-16") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("2003-06-17") & date <= as.Date("2003-12-17") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("2003-12-18") & date <= as.Date("2004-06-18") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("2004-01-15") & date <= as.Date("2004-06-16") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("2004-06-17") & date <= as.Date("2004-12-17") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("2004-12-18") & date <= as.Date("2005-06-18") ~ "post_control",
    TRUE ~ "no event"
  ))

drought_flood_df <- drought_flood_df %>% 
  mutate(event = case_when(
    ewe_type == "drought" ~ "drought",
    ewe_type == "flood" ~ "flood",
    ewe_type == "pre_drought" ~ "drought",
    ewe_type == "pre_flood" ~ "flood",
    ewe_type == "post_drought" ~ "drought",
    ewe_type == "post_flood" ~ "flood",
    ewe_type == "no event" & control == "pre_control" ~ "control",
    ewe_type == "no event" & control == "post_control" ~ "control",
    ewe_type == "no event" & control == "control" ~ "control",
    ewe_type == "no event" & control == "control" ~ "control",
    TRUE ~ "NA"
  )) %>%
  filter(!str_detect(event, "NA")) 

drought_flood_df <- drought_flood_df %>% 
  mutate(timing = case_when(
    ewe_type == "pre_drought" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_drought" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_flood" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_flood" ~ "post",
    control == "pre_control" ~ "pre",
    control == "post_control" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "drought" ~ "during_d",
    ewe_type == "flood" ~ "during_f",
    control == "control" ~ "during_c",
    TRUE ~ "NA"
  )) %>%
  filter(!str_detect(timing, "NA")) 

drought_flood_df <- drought_flood_df %>%
  mutate(timing = factor(timing, levels = c("pre", "post"))) %>%
  mutate(timing = relevel(timing, ref = "pre"))

df_table <- table(drought_flood_df$timing)
df_table <- table(drought_flood_df$event)
view(df_table)

```

Does mean streamflow corrrelate to drought and flood events?
- find average streamflow for years with drought/flood and for years without --> is there significant difference between the two?
- plot mean streamflow against time to see if there are spikes/dips in streamflow at drought/flood (or hurricane), or not
```{r}
# isolate each type 
drought_df <- drought_flood_df %>%
  filter(ewe_type == "drought")

flood_df <- drought_flood_df %>%
  filter(ewe_type == "flood")

df_control_df <- drought_flood_df %>%
  filter(ewe_type == "a_no event")

# find average streamflow for drought, flood, and non-event years
avg_stream_drought <- sum(drought_df$mean_streamflow, na.rm = TRUE ) / 2315
 # 234.387345106971

num_NAs <- sum(is.na(flood_df$mean_streamflow)) # 1640
avg_stream_flood <- sum(flood_df$mean_streamflow, na.rm = TRUE) / 2418
 # 167.276084130924
  
num_NAs <- sum(is.na(df_control_df$mean_streamflow)) # 8794
avg_stream_dfcontrol <- sum(df_control_df$mean_streamflow, na.rm = TRUE) / 15891
 # 212.373462064365

# plot individual streamflows next to each other for each dataset
a <- ggplot(data = drought_df, 
       aes(x = collection_date, y = mean_streamflow)) + 
  geom_point() + xlab("Collection Date") + ylab("Mean Streamflow") +
   theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
         panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
         panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
         panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
         panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
         panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"))

b <- ggplot(data = flood_df, 
       aes(x = collection_date, y = mean_streamflow)) + 
  geom_point() + xlab("Collection Date") + ylab("Mean Streamflow") +
   theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
         panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
         panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
         panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
         panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
         panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"))

c <- ggplot(data = df_control_df, 
       aes(x = collection_date, y = mean_streamflow)) + 
  geom_point() + xlab("Collection Date") + ylab("Mean Streamflow") +
   theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
         panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
         panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
         panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
         panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
         panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"))

abc <- ggarrange(a, b, c, common.legend = TRUE, legend = "bottom", labels = c("A", "B"))

print(abc)

# plot average streamflows next to each other

ggplot(data = drought_flood_df, 
       aes(x = year_collected, y = mean_streamflow)) +
  facet_wrap(~ewe_type) +
  geom_point() + xlab("Collection Date") + ylab("Mean Streamflow") +
   theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
         panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
         panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
         panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
         panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
         panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"))


```

Break drought and flood into their own dataset? drought vs control and flood vs control? 
randomly pull identical number of datapoints to use as control to drought and flood 
```{r}
ddf <- drought_flood_df %>%
  filter(ewe_type != "flood")

fdf <- drought_flood_df %>%
  filter(ewe_type != "drought")
```

Pick out years where there was no hurricane:
```{r}
# 1963, 1966, 1967, 1968, 1970, 1972, 1973, 
# 1975, 1976, 1977, 1978, 1980, 1981, 1982,
# 1983, 1984, 1986, 1987, 1989,
# 1990, 1991, 1993, 1994, 1999, 2000, 2003
```

Add actual hurricane timeline parameters for 6 month
```{r}
hurricane_df6 <- full_data %>%
  mutate(ewe_type = case_when(
    date >= as.Date("1969-02-14") & date <= as.Date("1969-08-14") ~ "pre_5",
    date >= as.Date("1969-08-14") & date <= as.Date("1969-08-22") ~ "hurricane_5",
    date >= as.Date("1969-08-22") & date <= as.Date("1970-02-22") ~ "post_5",
    date >= as.Date("1971-03-05") & date <= as.Date("1971-09-05") ~ "pre_5",
    date >= as.Date("1971-09-05") & date <= as.Date("1971-09-15") ~ "hurricane_5",
    date >= as.Date("1971-09-15") & date <= as.Date("1972-03-15") ~ "post_5",
    date >= as.Date("1988-03-08") & date <= as.Date("1988-09-08") ~ "pre_5",
    date >= as.Date("1988-09-08") & date <= as.Date("1988-09-19") ~ "hurricane_5",
    date >= as.Date("1988-09-19") & date <= as.Date("1989-03-19") ~ "post_5",
    date >= as.Date("1992-02-16") & date <= as.Date("1992-08-16") ~ "pre_5",
    date >= as.Date("1992-08-16") & date <= as.Date("1992-08-19") ~ "hurricane_5",
    date >= as.Date("1992-08-19") & date <= as.Date("1993-03-19") ~ "post_5",
    date >= as.Date("2004-03-02") & date <= as.Date("2004-09-02") ~ "pre_5",
    date >= as.Date("2004-09-02") & date <= as.Date("2004-09-25") ~ "hurricane_5",
    date >= as.Date("2004-09-25") & date <= as.Date("2005-03-25") ~ "post_5",
    date >= as.Date("1964-03-28") & date <= as.Date("1964-09-28") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("1964-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1964-10-05") ~ "hurricane_4",
    date >= as.Date("1964-10-05") & date <= as.Date("1965-04-05") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("1965-02-27") & date <= as.Date("1965-08-27") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("1965-08-27") & date <= as.Date("1965-09-13") ~ "hurricane_4",
    date >= as.Date("1965-09-13") & date <= as.Date("1966-03-13") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("1974-02-28") & date <= as.Date("1974-08-29") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("1974-08-29") & date <= as.Date("1974-09-10") ~ "hurricane_4",
    date >= as.Date("1974-09-10") & date <= as.Date("1975-03-10") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("1995-03-27") & date <= as.Date("1995-09-27") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("1995-09-27") & date <= as.Date("1995-10-06") ~ "hurricane_4",
    date >= as.Date("1995-10-06") & date <= as.Date("1996-04-06") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("1998-03-15") & date <= as.Date("1998-09-15") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("1998-09-15") & date <= as.Date("1998-10-01") ~ "hurricane_4",
    date >= as.Date("1998-10-01") & date <= as.Date("1999-04-01") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("2002-03-21") & date <= as.Date("2002-09-21") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("2002-09-21") & date <= as.Date("2002-10-04") ~ "hurricane_4",
    date >= as.Date("2002-10-04") & date <= as.Date("2003-04-04") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("1985-02-28") & date <= as.Date("1985-08-28") ~ "pre_3",
    date >= as.Date("1985-08-28") & date <= as.Date("1985-09-04") ~ "hurricane_3",
    date >= as.Date("1985-09-04") & date <= as.Date("1986-03-04") ~ "post_3",
    date >= as.Date("2004-03-14") & date <= as.Date("2004-09-14") ~ "pre_3",
    date >= as.Date("2004-09-14") & date <= as.Date("2004-09-27") ~ "hurricane_3",
    date >= as.Date("2004-09-27") & date <= as.Date("2005-03-27") ~ "post_3",
    date >= as.Date("1979-01-09") & date <= as.Date("1979-07-09") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1979-07-09") & date <= as.Date("1979-07-16") ~ "hurricane_1",
    date >= as.Date("1979-07-16") & date <= as.Date("1980-01-16") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-02-12") & date <= as.Date("1985-08-12") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-08-12") & date <= as.Date("1985-08-20") ~ "hurricane_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-08-20") & date <= as.Date("1986-02-20") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-04-26") & date <= as.Date("1985-10-26") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-10-26") & date <= as.Date("1985-11-03") ~ "hurricane_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-11-03") & date <= as.Date("1986-05-03") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1988-03-07") & date <= as.Date("1988-09-07") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1988-09-07") & date <= as.Date("1988-09-11") ~ "hurricane_1",
    date >= as.Date("1988-09-11") & date <= as.Date("1989-03-11") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1997-01-16") & date <= as.Date("1997-07-16") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1997-07-16") & date <= as.Date("1997-07-27") ~ "hurricane_1",
    date >= as.Date("1997-07-27") & date <= as.Date("1998-01-27") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1996-04-04") & date <= as.Date("1996-10-04") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1996-10-04") & date <= as.Date("1996-10-13") ~ "tropical_storm",
    date >= as.Date("1996-10-13") & date <= as.Date("1997-04-13") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1998-03-08") & date <= as.Date("1998-09-08") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1998-09-08") & date <= as.Date("1998-09-13") ~ "tropical_storm",
    date >= as.Date("1998-09-13") & date <= as.Date("1999-03-13") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2000-12-05") & date <= as.Date("2001-06-05") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2001-06-05") & date <= as.Date("2001-06-20") ~ "tropical_storm",
    date >= as.Date("2001-06-20") & date <= as.Date("2001-12-20") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2002-02-04") & date <= as.Date("2002-08-04") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2002-08-04") & date <= as.Date("2002-08-09") ~ "tropical_storm",
    date >= as.Date("2002-08-09") & date <= as.Date("2003-02-09") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2002-03-12") & date <= as.Date("2002-09-12") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2002-09-12") & date <= as.Date("2002-09-15") ~ "tropical_storm",
    date >= as.Date("2002-09-15") & date <= as.Date("2003-03-15") ~ "post_ts",
    TRUE ~ "no event"
  ))


# make a new column for storm intensity

hurricane_df6 <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  mutate(storm_intensity = case_when(
    str_detect(ewe_type, "1") ~ "one",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "2") ~ "two",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "3") ~ "three",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "4") ~ "four",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "5") ~ "five",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "ts") ~ "ts",
    TRUE ~ "no event"
  ))


# create hurricane control categories just like with the other dataset by assigning non-event years to have a pre and post category -- 6 months

hurricane_df6 <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  mutate(control = case_when(
    date >= as.Date("1963-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1963-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1963-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1963-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1963-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1964-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1966-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1966-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1966-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1966-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1966-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1967-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1967-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1967-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1967-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1967-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1967-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1968-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1968-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1968-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1968-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1968-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1968-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1969-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1970-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1970-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1970-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1970-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1970-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1971-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1972-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1972-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1972-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1972-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1972-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1973-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1973-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1973-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1973-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1973-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1973-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1974-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1975-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1975-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1975-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1975-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1975-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1976-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1976-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1976-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1976-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1976-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1976-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1977-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1977-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1977-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1977-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1977-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1977-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1978-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1978-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1978-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1978-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1978-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1978-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1979-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1980-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1980-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1980-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1980-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1980-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1981-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1981-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1981-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1981-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1981-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1981-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1982-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1982-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1982-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1982-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1982-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1982-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1983-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1983-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1983-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1983-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1983-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1983-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1984-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1987-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1987-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1987-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1987-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1987-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1988-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1989-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1989-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1989-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1989-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1989-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1990-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1990-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1990-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1990-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1990-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1990-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1991-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1991-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1991-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1991-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1991-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1991-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1992-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1994-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1994-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1994-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1994-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1994-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1995-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1999-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1999-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1999-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1999-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1999-09-28") & date <= as.Date("2000-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("2000-03-18") & date <= as.Date("2000-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("2000-09-18") & date <= as.Date("2000-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("2000-09-28") & date <= as.Date("2001-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("2003-03-18") & date <= as.Date("2003-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("2003-09-18") & date <= as.Date("2003-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("2003-09-28") & date <= as.Date("2004-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    TRUE ~ "no event"
  ))

hurricane_df6 <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  mutate(event = case_when(
    ewe_type == "pre_5" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_5" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_4" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_4" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_3" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_3" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_1" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_1" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_ts" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_ts" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "no event" & control == "pre_control" ~ "control",
    ewe_type == "no event" & control == "post_control" ~ "control",
    TRUE ~ "NA"
  )) %>%
  filter(event != "NA")

hurricane_df6 <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  mutate(timing = case_when(
    ewe_type == "pre_5" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_5" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_4" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_4" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_3" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_3" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_1" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_1" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_ts" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_ts" ~ "post",
    control == "pre_control" ~ "pre",
    control == "post_control" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "hurricane_4" ~ "during",
    TRUE ~ "NA"
  )) %>%
  filter(timing != "NA")


hurricane_df6 <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  mutate(timing = factor(timing, levels = c("pre", "post"))) %>%
  mutate(timing = relevel(timing, ref = "pre")) #%>% 
 # mutate(event = factor(event, levels = c("hurricane", "control"))) %>%
 # mutate(event = relevel(event, ref = "control"))

ewe_table6 <- table(hurricane_df6$event)
view(ewe_table6)
ewe_table6_2 <- table(hurricane_df6$timing)
view(ewe_table6_2)
```

find the average date of a hurricane:
```{r}
average_hurr <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  filter(str_detect(ewe_type, "hurricane")) %>%
  mutate(
    month = month(date),
    day = day(date)
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    average_month = mean(month),
    average_day = mean(day)
  )

# average hurricane happens on 9/18 each year

# find average duration of hurricane event

# Define date ranges for hurricane events
hurricane_events <- data.frame(
  start_date = as.Date(c("1969-08-14", "1971-09-05", "1988-09-08", 
                         "1992-08-16", "2004-09-02", "1964-09-28", 
                         "1965-08-27", "1974-08-29", "1995-09-27", 
                         "1998-09-15", "2002-09-21", "1985-08-28", 
                         "2004-09-14", "1979-07-09", "1985-08-12", 
                         "1985-10-26", "1988-09-07", "1997-07-16")),
  end_date = as.Date(c("1969-08-22", "1971-09-15", "1988-09-19", 
                       "1992-08-19", "2004-09-25", "1964-10-05", 
                       "1965-09-13", "1974-09-10", "1995-10-06", 
                       "1998-10-01", "2002-10-04", "1985-09-04", 
                       "2004-09-27", "1979-07-16", "1985-08-20", 
                       "1985-11-03", "1988-09-11", "1997-07-27"))
)

# Calculate durations of each hurricane event
hurricane_events$duration <- as.numeric(hurricane_events$end_date - hurricane_events$start_date)

# Calculate the average duration
average_duration <- mean(hurricane_events$duration)

# Print result
average_duration

# average is 10 days

```

Further refine hurricane parameters for 3 months buffer
```{r}
hurricane_df3 <- full_data %>%
  mutate(ewe_type = case_when(
    date >= as.Date("1969-05-14") & date <= as.Date("1969-08-14") ~ "pre_5",
    date >= as.Date("1969-08-14") & date <= as.Date("1969-08-22") ~ "hurricane_5",
    date >= as.Date("1969-08-22") & date <= as.Date("1969-11-22") ~ "post_5",
    date >= as.Date("1971-06-05") & date <= as.Date("1971-09-05") ~ "pre_5",
    date >= as.Date("1971-09-05") & date <= as.Date("1971-09-15") ~ "hurricane_5",
    date >= as.Date("1971-09-15") & date <= as.Date("1971-12-15") ~ "post_5",
    date >= as.Date("1988-06-08") & date <= as.Date("1988-09-08") ~ "pre_5",
    date >= as.Date("1988-09-08") & date <= as.Date("1988-09-19") ~ "hurricane_5",
    date >= as.Date("1988-09-19") & date <= as.Date("1988-12-19") ~ "post_5",
    date >= as.Date("1992-05-16") & date <= as.Date("1992-08-16") ~ "pre_5",
    date >= as.Date("1992-08-16") & date <= as.Date("1992-08-19") ~ "hurricane_5",
    date >= as.Date("1992-08-19") & date <= as.Date("1992-11-19") ~ "post_5",
    date >= as.Date("2004-06-02") & date <= as.Date("2004-09-02") ~ "pre_5",
    date >= as.Date("2004-09-02") & date <= as.Date("2004-09-25") ~ "hurricane_5",
    date >= as.Date("2004-09-25") & date <= as.Date("2004-12-25") ~ "post_5",
    date >= as.Date("1964-06-28") & date <= as.Date("1964-09-28") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("1964-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1964-10-05") ~ "hurricane_4",
    date >= as.Date("1964-10-05") & date <= as.Date("1965-01-05") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("1965-05-27") & date <= as.Date("1965-08-27") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("1965-08-27") & date <= as.Date("1965-09-13") ~ "hurricane_4",
    date >= as.Date("1965-09-13") & date <= as.Date("1965-12-13") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("1974-05-28") & date <= as.Date("1974-08-29") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("1974-08-29") & date <= as.Date("1974-09-10") ~ "hurricane_4",
    date >= as.Date("1974-09-10") & date <= as.Date("1974-12-10") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("1995-06-27") & date <= as.Date("1995-09-27") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("1995-09-27") & date <= as.Date("1995-10-06") ~ "hurricane_4",
    date >= as.Date("1995-10-06") & date <= as.Date("1996-01-06") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("1998-06-15") & date <= as.Date("1998-09-15") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("1998-09-15") & date <= as.Date("1998-10-01") ~ "hurricane_4",
    date >= as.Date("1998-10-01") & date <= as.Date("1999-01-01") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("2002-06-21") & date <= as.Date("2002-09-21") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("2002-09-21") & date <= as.Date("2002-10-04") ~ "hurricane_4",
    date >= as.Date("2002-10-04") & date <= as.Date("2003-01-04") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("1985-05-28") & date <= as.Date("1985-08-28") ~ "pre_3",
    date >= as.Date("1985-08-28") & date <= as.Date("1985-09-04") ~ "hurricane_3",
    date >= as.Date("1985-09-04") & date <= as.Date("1985-12-04") ~ "post_3",
    date >= as.Date("2004-06-14") & date <= as.Date("2004-09-14") ~ "pre_3",
    date >= as.Date("2004-09-14") & date <= as.Date("2004-09-27") ~ "hurricane_3",
    date >= as.Date("2004-09-27") & date <= as.Date("2004-12-27") ~ "post_3",
    date >= as.Date("1979-04-09") & date <= as.Date("1979-07-09") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1979-07-09") & date <= as.Date("1979-07-16") ~ "hurricane_1",
    date >= as.Date("1979-07-16") & date <= as.Date("1979-10-16") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-05-12") & date <= as.Date("1985-08-12") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-08-12") & date <= as.Date("1985-08-20") ~ "hurricane_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-08-20") & date <= as.Date("1985-11-20") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-07-26") & date <= as.Date("1985-10-26") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-10-26") & date <= as.Date("1985-11-03") ~ "hurricane_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-11-03") & date <= as.Date("1986-02-03") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1988-06-07") & date <= as.Date("1988-09-07") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1988-09-07") & date <= as.Date("1988-09-11") ~ "hurricane_1",
    date >= as.Date("1988-09-11") & date <= as.Date("1988-12-11") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1997-04-16") & date <= as.Date("1997-07-16") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1997-07-16") & date <= as.Date("1997-07-27") ~ "hurricane_1",
    date >= as.Date("1997-07-27") & date <= as.Date("1997-10-27") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1996-07-04") & date <= as.Date("1996-10-04") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1996-10-04") & date <= as.Date("1996-10-13") ~ "tropical_storm",
    date >= as.Date("1996-10-13") & date <= as.Date("1997-01-13") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1998-06-08") & date <= as.Date("1998-09-08") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1998-09-08") & date <= as.Date("1998-09-13") ~ "tropical_storm",
    date >= as.Date("1998-09-13") & date <= as.Date("1998-12-13") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2001-03-05") & date <= as.Date("2001-06-05") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2001-06-05") & date <= as.Date("2001-06-20") ~ "tropical_storm",
    date >= as.Date("2001-06-20") & date <= as.Date("2001-09-20") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2002-05-04") & date <= as.Date("2002-08-04") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2002-08-04") & date <= as.Date("2002-08-09") ~ "tropical_storm",
    date >= as.Date("2002-08-09") & date <= as.Date("2002-11-09") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2002-06-12") & date <= as.Date("2002-09-12") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2002-09-12") & date <= as.Date("2002-09-15") ~ "tropical_storm",
    date >= as.Date("2002-09-15") & date <= as.Date("2002-12-15") ~ "post_ts",
    TRUE ~ "no event"
  ))

# make a new column for storm intensity

hurricane_df3 <- hurricane_df3 %>%
  mutate(storm_intensity = case_when(
    str_detect(ewe_type, "1") ~ "one",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "2") ~ "two",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "3") ~ "three",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "4") ~ "four",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "5") ~ "five",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "ts") ~ "tropical storm",
    TRUE ~ "no event"
  ))


# create hurricane control categories just like with the other dataset by assigning non-event years to have a pre and post category -- 3 months

hurricane_df3 <- hurricane_df3 %>%
  mutate(control = case_when(
    date >= as.Date("1963-06-18") & date <= as.Date("1963-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1963-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1963-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1963-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1963-12-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1966-06-18") & date <= as.Date("1966-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1966-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1966-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1966-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1966-12-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1967-06-18") & date <= as.Date("1967-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1967-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1967-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1967-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1967-12-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1968-06-18") & date <= as.Date("1968-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1968-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1968-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1968-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1968-12-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1970-06-18") & date <= as.Date("1970-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1970-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1970-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1970-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1970-12-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1972-06-18") & date <= as.Date("1972-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1972-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1972-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1972-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1972-12-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1973-06-18") & date <= as.Date("1973-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1973-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1973-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1973-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1973-12-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1975-06-18") & date <= as.Date("1975-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1975-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1975-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1975-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1975-12-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1976-06-18") & date <= as.Date("1976-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1976-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1976-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1976-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1976-12-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1977-06-18") & date <= as.Date("1977-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1977-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1977-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1977-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1977-12-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1978-06-18") & date <= as.Date("1978-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1978-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1978-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1978-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1978-12-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1980-06-18") & date <= as.Date("1980-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1980-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1980-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1980-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1980-12-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1981-06-18") & date <= as.Date("1981-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1981-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1981-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1981-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1981-12-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1982-06-18") & date <= as.Date("1982-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1982-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1982-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1982-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1982-12-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1983-06-18") & date <= as.Date("1983-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1983-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1983-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1983-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1983-12-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1987-06-18") & date <= as.Date("1987-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1987-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1987-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1987-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1987-12-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1989-06-18") & date <= as.Date("1989-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1989-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1989-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1989-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1989-12-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1990-06-18") & date <= as.Date("1990-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1990-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1990-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1990-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1990-12-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1991-06-18") & date <= as.Date("1991-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1991-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1991-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1991-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1991-12-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1994-06-18") & date <= as.Date("1994-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1994-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1994-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1994-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1994-12-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1999-06-18") & date <= as.Date("1999-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1999-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1999-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1999-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1999-12-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("2000-06-18") & date <= as.Date("2000-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("2000-09-18") & date <= as.Date("2000-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("2000-09-28") & date <= as.Date("2000-12-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("2003-06-18") & date <= as.Date("2003-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("2003-09-18") & date <= as.Date("2003-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("2003-09-28") & date <= as.Date("2003-12-28") ~ "post_control",
    TRUE ~ "no event"
  ))

hurricane_df3 <- hurricane_df3 %>%
  mutate(event = case_when(
    ewe_type == "pre_5" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_5" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_4" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_4" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_3" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_3" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_1" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_1" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_ts" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_ts" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "no event" & control == "pre_control" ~ "control",
    ewe_type == "no event" & control == "post_control" ~ "control",
    TRUE ~ "NA"
  )) %>%
  filter(event != "NA")

hurricane_df3 <- hurricane_df3 %>%
  mutate(timing = case_when(
    ewe_type == "pre_5" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_5" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_4" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_4" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_3" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_3" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_1" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_1" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_ts" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_ts" ~ "post",
    control == "pre_control" ~ "pre",
    control == "post_control" ~ "post",
    TRUE ~ "NA"
  )) %>%
  filter(timing != "NA")

hurricane_df3 <- hurricane_df3 %>%
  mutate(timing = factor(timing, levels = c("pre", "post"))) %>%
  mutate(timing = relevel(timing, ref = "pre")) #%>% 
 # mutate(event = factor(event, levels = c("hurricane", "control"))) %>%
 # mutate(event = relevel(event, ref = "control"))

ewe_table3 <- table(hurricane_df3$event)
view(ewe_table3)

```

### By individual fish species
```{r}
carvel <- carvel %>% 
  mutate(ewe_type = case_when(
    year_collected >= 1967 & year_collected < 1969 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1976 & year_collected < 1977 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1981 & year_collected < 1981 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1985 & year_collected < 1986 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 2000 & year_collected < 2000 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected == 27 & year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected == 12 ~ "flood",
    year_collected >= 1972 & month_collected == 12 & year_collected >= 1973 & month_collected == 6 ~ "flood",
    year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected == 4 & year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected == 4 ~ "flood",
    year_collected >= 1964 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected == 28 & year_collected >= 1964 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected == 5 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1964 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1964 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 27 & year_collected <= 1965 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 13 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1965 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts", 
    year_collected >= 1969 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 14 & year_collected <= 1969 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 22 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1969 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1969 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1971 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1971 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 15 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1971 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1971 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1974 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 29 & year_collected <= 1974 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 10 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1974 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1974 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected >= 9 & year_collected <= 1979 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected <= 16 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 1979 & month_collected <= 10 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 12 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 20 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 28 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 4 ~ "hurricane_3", 
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_3_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected >= 26 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected == 11 & day_collected <= 3 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected >= 7 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 7 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 8 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 19 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1992 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 16 & year_collected <= 1992 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 29 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1992 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1992 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1995 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 27 & year_collected <= 1995 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 6 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1995 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1995 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1996 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 1996 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 13 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 1996 & month_collected >= 7 & year_collected <= 1996 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1997 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected >= 16 & year_collected <= 1997 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected <= 27 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1997 & month_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 1997 & month_collected <= 10 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 8 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 13 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 15 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 1 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 14 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 27 ~ "hurricane_3", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_3_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 21 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 4 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2004 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 2 & year_collected <= 2004 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 25 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 2004 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2004 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2001 & month_collected == 6 & day_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 2001 & month_collected == 6 & day_collected <= 20 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 2001 & month_collected >= 3 & year_collected <= 2001 & month_collected <= 9 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 9 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 12 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 15 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    TRUE ~ "no_event"
  ))

gamaff <- gamaff %>% 
  mutate(ewe_type = case_when(
    year_collected >= 1967 & year_collected < 1969 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1976 & year_collected < 1977 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1981 & year_collected < 1981 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1985 & year_collected < 1986 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 2000 & year_collected < 2000 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected == 27 & year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected == 12 ~ "flood",
    year_collected >= 1972 & month_collected == 12 & year_collected >= 1973 & month_collected == 6 ~ "flood",
    year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected == 4 & year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected == 4 ~ "flood",
    year_collected >= 1964 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected == 28 & year_collected >= 1964 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected == 5 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1964 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1964 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 27 & year_collected <= 1965 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 13 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1965 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts", 
    year_collected >= 1969 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 14 & year_collected <= 1969 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 22 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1969 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1969 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1971 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1971 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 15 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1971 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1971 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1974 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 29 & year_collected <= 1974 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 10 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1974 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1974 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected >= 9 & year_collected <= 1979 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected <= 16 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 1979 & month_collected <= 10 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 12 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 20 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 28 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 4 ~ "hurricane_3", 
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_3_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected >= 26 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected == 11 & day_collected <= 3 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected >= 7 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 7 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 8 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 19 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1992 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 16 & year_collected <= 1992 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 29 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1992 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1992 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1995 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 27 & year_collected <= 1995 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 6 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1995 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1995 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1996 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 1996 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 13 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 1996 & month_collected >= 7 & year_collected <= 1996 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1997 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected >= 16 & year_collected <= 1997 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected <= 27 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1997 & month_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 1997 & month_collected <= 10 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 8 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 13 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 15 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 1 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 14 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 27 ~ "hurricane_3", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_3_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 21 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 4 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2004 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 2 & year_collected <= 2004 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 25 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 2004 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2004 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2001 & month_collected == 6 & day_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 2001 & month_collected == 6 & day_collected <= 20 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 2001 & month_collected >= 3 & year_collected <= 2001 & month_collected <= 9 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 9 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 12 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 15 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    TRUE ~ "no_event"
  ))

hybnuc <- hybnuc %>% 
  mutate(ewe_type = case_when(
    year_collected >= 1967 & year_collected < 1969 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1976 & year_collected < 1977 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1981 & year_collected < 1981 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1985 & year_collected < 1986 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 2000 & year_collected < 2000 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected == 27 & year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected == 12 ~ "flood",
    year_collected >= 1972 & month_collected == 12 & year_collected >= 1973 & month_collected == 6 ~ "flood",
    year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected == 4 & year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected == 4 ~ "flood",
    year_collected >= 1964 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected == 28 & year_collected >= 1964 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected == 5 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1964 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1964 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 27 & year_collected <= 1965 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 13 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1965 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts", 
    year_collected >= 1969 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 14 & year_collected <= 1969 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 22 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1969 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1969 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1971 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1971 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 15 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1971 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1971 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1974 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 29 & year_collected <= 1974 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 10 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1974 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1974 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected >= 9 & year_collected <= 1979 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected <= 16 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 1979 & month_collected <= 10 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 12 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 20 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 28 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 4 ~ "hurricane_3", 
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_3_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected >= 26 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected == 11 & day_collected <= 3 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected >= 7 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 7 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 8 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 19 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1992 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 16 & year_collected <= 1992 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 29 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1992 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1992 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1995 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 27 & year_collected <= 1995 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 6 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1995 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1995 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1996 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 1996 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 13 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 1996 & month_collected >= 7 & year_collected <= 1996 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1997 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected >= 16 & year_collected <= 1997 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected <= 27 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1997 & month_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 1997 & month_collected <= 10 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 8 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 13 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 15 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 1 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 14 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 27 ~ "hurricane_3", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_3_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 21 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 4 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2004 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 2 & year_collected <= 2004 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 25 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 2004 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2004 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2001 & month_collected == 6 & day_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 2001 & month_collected == 6 & day_collected <= 20 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 2001 & month_collected >= 3 & year_collected <= 2001 & month_collected <= 9 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 9 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 12 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 15 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    TRUE ~ "no_event"
  ))

ictpun <- ictpun %>% 
  mutate(ewe_type = case_when(
    year_collected >= 1967 & year_collected < 1969 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1976 & year_collected < 1977 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1981 & year_collected < 1981 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1985 & year_collected < 1986 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 2000 & year_collected < 2000 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected == 27 & year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected == 12 ~ "flood",
    year_collected >= 1972 & month_collected == 12 & year_collected >= 1973 & month_collected == 6 ~ "flood",
    year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected == 4 & year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected == 4 ~ "flood",
    year_collected >= 1964 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected == 28 & year_collected >= 1964 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected == 5 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1964 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1964 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 27 & year_collected <= 1965 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 13 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1965 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts", 
    year_collected >= 1969 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 14 & year_collected <= 1969 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 22 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1969 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1969 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1971 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1971 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 15 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1971 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1971 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1974 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 29 & year_collected <= 1974 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 10 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1974 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1974 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected >= 9 & year_collected <= 1979 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected <= 16 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 1979 & month_collected <= 10 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 12 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 20 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 28 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 4 ~ "hurricane_3", 
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_3_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected >= 26 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected == 11 & day_collected <= 3 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected >= 7 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 7 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 8 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 19 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1992 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 16 & year_collected <= 1992 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 29 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1992 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1992 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1995 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 27 & year_collected <= 1995 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 6 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1995 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1995 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1996 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 1996 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 13 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 1996 & month_collected >= 7 & year_collected <= 1996 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1997 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected >= 16 & year_collected <= 1997 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected <= 27 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1997 & month_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 1997 & month_collected <= 10 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 8 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 13 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 15 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 1 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 14 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 27 ~ "hurricane_3", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_3_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 21 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 4 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2004 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 2 & year_collected <= 2004 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 25 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 2004 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2004 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2001 & month_collected == 6 & day_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 2001 & month_collected == 6 & day_collected <= 20 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 2001 & month_collected >= 3 & year_collected <= 2001 & month_collected <= 9 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 9 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 12 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 15 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    TRUE ~ "no_event"
  ))

notath <- notath %>% 
  mutate(ewe_type = case_when(
    year_collected >= 1967 & year_collected < 1969 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1976 & year_collected < 1977 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1981 & year_collected < 1981 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1985 & year_collected < 1986 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 2000 & year_collected < 2000 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected == 27 & year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected == 12 ~ "flood",
    year_collected >= 1972 & month_collected == 12 & year_collected >= 1973 & month_collected == 6 ~ "flood",
    year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected == 4 & year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected == 4 ~ "flood",
    year_collected >= 1964 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected == 28 & year_collected >= 1964 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected == 5 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1964 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1964 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 27 & year_collected <= 1965 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 13 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1965 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts", 
    year_collected >= 1969 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 14 & year_collected <= 1969 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 22 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1969 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1969 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1971 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1971 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 15 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1971 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1971 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1974 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 29 & year_collected <= 1974 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 10 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1974 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1974 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected >= 9 & year_collected <= 1979 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected <= 16 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 1979 & month_collected <= 10 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 12 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 20 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 28 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 4 ~ "hurricane_3", 
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_3_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected >= 26 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected == 11 & day_collected <= 3 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected >= 7 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 7 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
```
