```{r}
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 8 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 19 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1992 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 16 & year_collected <= 1992 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 29 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1992 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1992 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1995 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 27 & year_collected <= 1995 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 6 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1995 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1995 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1996 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 1996 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 13 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 1996 & month_collected >= 7 & year_collected <= 1996 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1997 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected >= 16 & year_collected <= 1997 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected <= 27 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1997 & month_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 1997 & month_collected <= 10 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 8 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 13 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 15 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 1 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 14 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 27 ~ "hurricane_3", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_3_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 21 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 4 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2004 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 2 & year_collected <= 2004 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 25 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 2004 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2004 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2001 & month_collected == 6 & day_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 2001 & month_collected == 6 & day_collected <= 20 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 2001 & month_collected >= 3 & year_collected <= 2001 & month_collected <= 9 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 9 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 12 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 15 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    TRUE ~ "no_event"
  ))

pervig <- pervig %>% 
  mutate(ewe_type = case_when(
    year_collected >= 1967 & year_collected < 1969 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1976 & year_collected < 1977 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1981 & year_collected < 1981 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1985 & year_collected < 1986 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 2000 & year_collected < 2000 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected == 27 & year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected == 12 ~ "flood",
    year_collected >= 1972 & month_collected == 12 & year_collected >= 1973 & month_collected == 6 ~ "flood",
    year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected == 4 & year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected == 4 ~ "flood",
    year_collected >= 1964 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected == 28 & year_collected >= 1964 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected == 5 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1964 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1964 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 27 & year_collected <= 1965 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 13 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1965 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts", 
    year_collected >= 1969 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 14 & year_collected <= 1969 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 22 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1969 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1969 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1971 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1971 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 15 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1971 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1971 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1974 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 29 & year_collected <= 1974 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 10 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1974 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1974 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected >= 9 & year_collected <= 1979 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected <= 16 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 1979 & month_collected <= 10 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 12 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 20 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 28 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 4 ~ "hurricane_3", 
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_3_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected >= 26 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected == 11 & day_collected <= 3 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected >= 7 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 7 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 8 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 19 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1992 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 16 & year_collected <= 1992 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 29 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1992 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1992 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1995 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 27 & year_collected <= 1995 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 6 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1995 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1995 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1996 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 1996 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 13 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 1996 & month_collected >= 7 & year_collected <= 1996 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1997 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected >= 16 & year_collected <= 1997 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected <= 27 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1997 & month_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 1997 & month_collected <= 10 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 8 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 13 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 15 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 1 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 14 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 27 ~ "hurricane_3", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_3_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 21 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 4 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2004 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 2 & year_collected <= 2004 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 25 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 2004 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2004 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2001 & month_collected == 6 & day_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 2001 & month_collected == 6 & day_collected <= 20 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 2001 & month_collected >= 3 & year_collected <= 2001 & month_collected <= 9 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 9 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 12 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 15 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    TRUE ~ "no_event"
  ))

pimvig <- pimvig %>% 
  mutate(ewe_type = case_when(
    year_collected >= 1967 & year_collected < 1969 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1976 & year_collected < 1977 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1981 & year_collected < 1981 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1985 & year_collected < 1986 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 2000 & year_collected < 2000 ~ "drought",
    year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected == 27 & year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected == 12 ~ "flood",
    year_collected >= 1972 & month_collected == 12 & year_collected >= 1973 & month_collected == 6 ~ "flood",
    year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected == 4 & year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected == 4 ~ "flood",
    year_collected >= 1964 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected == 28 & year_collected >= 1964 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected == 5 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1964 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1964 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 27 & year_collected <= 1965 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 13 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1965 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1965 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts", 
    year_collected >= 1969 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 14 & year_collected <= 1969 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 22 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1969 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1969 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1971 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1971 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 15 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1971 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1971 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1974 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 29 & year_collected <= 1974 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 10 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1974 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1974 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected >= 9 & year_collected <= 1979 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected <= 16 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1979 & month_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 1979 & month_collected <= 10 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 12 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 20 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 28 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 4 ~ "hurricane_3", 
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_3_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected >= 26 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected == 11 & day_collected <= 3 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1985 & month_collected >= 7 & year_collected <= 1985 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 7 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 8 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 19 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1988 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1988 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1992 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 16 & year_collected <= 1992 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 29 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 1992 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 1992 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1995 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 27 & year_collected <= 1995 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 6 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1995 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1995 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1996 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 1996 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 13 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 1996 & month_collected >= 7 & year_collected <= 1996 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1997 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected >= 16 & year_collected <= 1997 & month_collected == 7 & day_collected <= 27 ~ "hurricane_1", 
    year_collected >= 1997 & month_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 1997 & month_collected <= 10 ~ "hurricane_1_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 8 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 13 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 15 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 1 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 1998 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 1998 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 14 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 27 ~ "hurricane_3", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_3_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 21 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 10 & day_collected <= 4 ~ "hurricane_4", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_4_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2004 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 2 & year_collected <= 2004 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 25 ~ "hurricane_5", 
    year_collected >= 2004 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2004 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "hurricane_5_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2001 & month_collected == 6 & day_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 2001 & month_collected == 6 & day_collected <= 20 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 2001 & month_collected >= 3 & year_collected <= 2001 & month_collected <= 9 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected >= 4 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 8 & day_collected <= 9 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 5 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 11 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected >= 12 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected == 9 & day_collected <= 15 ~ "tropical_storm", 
    year_collected >= 2002 & month_collected >= 6 & year_collected <= 2002 & month_collected <= 12 ~ "tropical_storm_impacts",
    TRUE ~ "no_event"
  ))
```

Filter by myxozoan to create category for parasite prevalence (presence absence). Make all other parasites count as parasite_count.
```{r}
### sum all parasites in each fish
carvel <- carvel %>%
  mutate(psite_count = rowSums(across(c( 
                      "cest_ws",
                      "cest_megan",
                      "cest_tri",
                      "cest_arch",
                      "cope_hny",
                      "nem_cerl",
                      "trem_sep",
                      "trem_ors",
                      "trem_cv",
                      "trem_larv"), 
                      ~ as.numeric(.), 
                      .names = "psite_count"), 
                      na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

carvel <- carvel %>%
  mutate(psite_prevalence = rowSums(across(c(
                      "myx_s",
                      "myx_f",
                      "myx_e",
                      "myx_g",
                      "myx_cm",
                      "myx_bna",
                      "myx_kl",
                      "myx_gm"), 
                      ~ as.numeric(.), 
                      .names = "psite_count"), 
                      na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

pimvig <- pimvig %>%
  mutate(psite_count = rowSums(across(c( 
                      "acanth_bigb", 
                      "acanth_bkr",
                      "nem_cona",
                      "nem_cap",
                      "nem_dich",
                      "nem_larv",
                      "nem_trbk",
                      "nem_unk",
                      "cest_godz",
                      "cest_ntg",
                      "cope_cl",
                      "cope_grab",
                      "cest_pea",
                      "cest_l",
                      "cest_vit",
                      "cest_unk",
                      "mono_gyro",
                      "mono_dact",
                      "mono_lg",
                      "trem_rnda",
                      "trem_unk",
                      "meta_hs",
                      "meta_unk",
                      "cest_comp",
                      "trem_met",
                      "trem_sss",
                      "trem_buc",
                      "trem_metaf",
                      "trem_metags",
                      "trem_ms",
                      "trem_nea"), 
                      ~ as.numeric(.), 
                      .names = "psite_count"), 
                      na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

pimvig <- pimvig %>%
  mutate(psite_prevalence = rowSums(across(c(
                      "myx_go",
                      "myx_geom",
                      "myxo_bc",
                      "myx_thel",
                      "myxo_sbad",
                      "myxo_unk",
                      "myxo_up"), 
                      ~ as.numeric(.), 
                      .names = "psite_count"), 
                      na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

ictpun <- ictpun %>%
  mutate(psite_count = rowSums(across(c( 
                      "nem_cyst",
                      "trem_meta_gg",
                      "trem_meta_unk",
                      "trem_lg",
                      "nem_cyst",
                      "cest_comp",
                      "acan_ostr",
                      "cest_meg",
                      "leech_kut",
                      "nem_nmts",
                      "mono_ip",
                      "mono_unk",
                      "nem_phar",
                      "nem_pty",
                      "nem_sp",
                      "nem_taf",
                      "nem_unk",
                      "nmorph",
                      "trem_2",
                      "trem_allo",
                      "trem_ble",
                      "trem_crep",
                      "trem_f",
                      "trem_lip",
                      "trem_megict",
                      "trem_smile",
                      "trem_unk"), 
                      ~ as.numeric(.), 
                      .names = "psite_count"), 
                      na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

ictpun <- ictpun %>%
  mutate(psite_prevalence = rowSums(across(c(
                      "myx_tail",
                      "myx_geom"), 
                      ~ as.numeric(.), 
                      .names = "psite_count"), 
                      na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

notath <- notath %>%
  mutate(psite_count = rowSums(across(c( 
                      "nem_cyst",
                      "trem_larv",
                      "trem_meta",
                      "cest_comp",
                      "cest_lvs",
                      "trem_cyst",
                      "cest_hyd",
                      "cest_tri",
                      "cope_a",
                      "mono_all",
                      "mono_unk",
                      "nem_bran",
                      "nem_cap",
                      "nem_spky",
                      "nem_tfs",
                      "nem_twas",
                      "nem_unkn",
                      "trem_gb",
                      "trem_l"), 
                      ~ as.numeric(.), 
                      .names = "psite_count"), 
                      na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

notath <- notath %>%
  mutate(psite_prevalence = rowSums(across(c(
                      "myx_sp", 
                      "myx_round"), 
                      ~ as.numeric(.), 
                      .names = "psite_count"), 
                      na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

hybnuc <- hybnuc %>%
  mutate(psite_count = rowSums(across(c( 
                      "nem_daft",
                      "trem_cm",
                      "trem_meta_het",
                      "trem_meta_sp",
                      "trem_bc",
                      "trem_meta_go",
                      "trem_meta_es",
                      "meta_unk",
                      "trem_meta",
                      "trem_meta_unk",
                      "cest_bb",
                      "nem_unk",
                      "trem_ass",
                      "trem_ns",
                      "trem_diplo",
                      "trem_unk",
                      "cest_unk",
                      "mono_dact",
                      "mono_gdac",
                      "acan_ad",
                      "cope_pood"), 
                      ~ as.numeric(.), 
                      .names = "psite_count"), 
                      na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

hybnuc <- hybnuc %>%
  mutate(psite_prevalence = rowSums(across(c(
                      "myx_ak",
                      "myx_fi",
                      "myx_tin",
                      "myx_gl",
                      "myx_ot",
                      "myx_eye",
                      "myx_gc"), 
                      ~ as.numeric(.), 
                      .names = "psite_count"), 
                      na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

hybnuc <- hybnuc %>%
  mutate(psite_count = rowSums(across(c( 
                      "nem_daft",
                      "trem_cm",
                      "trem_meta_het",
                      "trem_meta_sp",
                      "trem_bc",
                      "trem_meta_go",
                      "trem_meta_es",
                      "meta_unk",
                      "trem_meta",
                      "trem_meta_unk",
                      "cest_bb",
                      "nem_unk",
                      "trem_ass",
                      "trem_ns",
                      "trem_diplo",
                      "trem_unk",
                      "cest_unk",
                      "mono_dact",
                      "mono_gdac",
                      "acan_ad",
                      "cope_pood"), 
                      ~ as.numeric(.), 
                      .names = "psite_count"), 
                      na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

hybnuc <- hybnuc %>%
  mutate(psite_prevalence = rowSums(across(c(
                      "myx_ak",
                      "myx_fi",
                      "myx_tin",
                      "myx_gl",
                      "myx_ot",
                      "myx_eye",
                      "myx_gc"), 
                      ~ as.numeric(.), 
                      .names = "psite_count"), 
                      na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

pervig <- pervig %>%
  mutate(psite_count = rowSums(across(c( 
                     "nem_heath",
                     "nem_squig",
                     "acanth_bb",
                     "trem_phlb",
                     "cest_bot",
                     "mono_gyro",
                     "nem_larv",
                     "acanth_cya",
                     "acanth_thin",
                     "trem_sk",
                     "trem_chonk",
                     "trem_endous",
                     "trem_cl",
                     "trem_ispot"), 
                      ~ as.numeric(.), 
                      .names = "psite_count"), 
                      na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

pervig <- pervig %>%
  mutate(psite_prevalence = rowSums(across(c(
                     ), 
                      ~ as.numeric(.), 
                      .names = "psite_count"), 
                      na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

gamaff <- gamaff %>%
  mutate(psite_count = rowSums(across(c( 
                     "acanth_nemor", 
                     "acanth_blve", 
                     "cest_mipi", 
                     "cest_unk", 
                     "nem_larv", 
                     "nem_unk", 
                     "meta_bolism", 
                     "meta_z",
                     "mono_sase",
                     "mono_g",
                     "cest_woad",
                     "cest_y",
                     "cest_triga",
                     "nem_oodle", 
                     "nem_w",
                     "nem_pretz",
                     "nem_esis", 
                     "trem_shy", 
                     "trem_scorp",
                     "trem_ga", 
                     "trem_pos"), 
                      ~ as.numeric(.), 
                      .names = "psite_count"), 
                      na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

gamaff <- gamaff %>%
  mutate(psite_prevalence = rowSums(across(c(
                     "myx_stwy", 
                     "myx_thin",
                     "myx_upc"), 
                      ~ as.numeric(.), 
                      .names = "psite_count"), 
                      na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

```

Combine Datasets into one
```{r}
# Add a column identifying each dataset
carvel <- carvel %>% mutate(dataset = "carvel")
pimvig <- pimvig %>% mutate(dataset = "pimvig")
ictpun <- ictpun %>% mutate(dataset = "ictpun")
notath <- notath %>% mutate(dataset = "notath")
hybnuc <- hybnuc %>% mutate(dataset = "hybnuc")
pervig <- pervig %>% mutate(dataset = "pervig")
gamaff <- gamaff %>% mutate(dataset = "gamaff")

# Ensure `day_collected` is numeric in all datasets
carvel <- carvel %>% mutate(day_collected = as.numeric(day_collected))
pimvig <- pimvig %>% mutate(day_collected = as.numeric(day_collected))
ictpun <- ictpun %>% mutate(day_collected = as.numeric(day_collected))
notath <- notath %>% mutate(day_collected = as.numeric(day_collected))
hybnuc <- hybnuc %>% mutate(day_collected = as.numeric(day_collected))
pervig <- pervig %>% mutate(day_collected = as.numeric(day_collected))
gamaff <- gamaff %>% mutate(day_collected = as.numeric(day_collected))

# Add the species column if not already present
carvel <- carvel %>% mutate(dataset = "carvel")
pimvig <- pimvig %>% mutate(dataset = "pimvig")
ictpun <- ictpun %>% mutate(dataset = "ictpun")
notath <- notath %>% mutate(dataset = "notath")
hybnuc <- hybnuc %>% mutate(dataset = "hybnuc")
pervig <- pervig %>% mutate(dataset = "pervig")
gamaff <- gamaff %>% mutate(dataset = "gamaff")

# Combine all datasets into one
combined_dataset <- bind_rows(carvel, pimvig, ictpun, notath, hybnuc, pervig, gamaff)

# filter out columns that arent needed
# Specify the columns to keep
columns_to_keep <- c("catalog_number", "year_collected", "month_collected", "day_collected", "individual_fish_id", "sex",
                     "total_length_mm", "standard_length_mm", "weight_mg", "ci", "ewe_type", "psite_count", "psite_prevalence",
                     "dataset", "latitude", "longitude")

# Keep only the specified columns
combined_data <- combined_dataset %>%
  select(all_of(columns_to_keep))
```



## Plots
#### 554 main plot
create color palette
```{r}
lacroix_palettes_list <- LaCroixColoR::lacroix_palettes

my_pal <- lacroix_palette("Pamplemousse", n = 5, type = "continuous")
```

Faceting Labels
```{r}
parasite_order <- c(
  "trematode", "myxozoan", "monogenean", "ciliate",
  "nematode", "acanthocephalan", "cestode", "copepod", "nematomorph"
)

parasite_labels <- c(
  "trematode" = "Trematode",
  "myxozoan" = "Myxozoan",
  "monogenean" = "Monogenean",
  "ciliate" = "Ciliate",
  "nematode" = "Nematode",
  "cestode" = "Cestode",
  "acanthocephalan" = "Acanthocephalan",
  "copepod" = "Copepod", 
  "nematomorph" = "Nematomorph"
)


storm_order <- c("five", "four", "three", "two", "one", "ts", "control")

storm_labels <- c(
  "five" = "5",
  "four" = "4",
  "three" = "3",
  "two" = "2",
  "one" = "1",
  "ts" = "TS", 
  "control" = "control"
)

season_order <- c(
  "winter", "spring", "summer", "fall"
)

season_labels <- c(
  "winter" = "Winter",
  "spring" = "Spring", 
  "summer" = "Summer", 
  "fall" = "Fall"
)

timing_order <- c(
  "pre", "during", "post"
)

timing_labels <- c(
  "pre" = "Pre",
  "during" = "During",
  "post" = "Post"
)



```

Mutate the dataset so that the total sum of each type of parasite can be plotted:
```{r}
hurricane_df6_sum <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  group_by(psite_type, storm_intensity, season, event, timing ) %>%
  summarize(total_psite_count = sum(psite_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>% 
  filter(storm_intensity != "no event",
         total_psite_count != "0") %>%
  filter(!is.na(psite_type), 
         psite_type != "leech")

hurricane_df6_sum <- hurricane_df6_sum %>%
    mutate(psite_type = fct_relevel(psite_type, parasite_order))

hurricane_df6_sum <- hurricane_df6_sum %>%
    mutate(storm_intensity = fct_relevel(storm_intensity, storm_order))

hurricane_df6_sum <- hurricane_df6_sum %>%
    mutate(season = fct_relevel(season, season_order))

hurricane_df6_sum <- hurricane_df6_sum %>%
    mutate(timing = fct_relevel(timing, timing_order))

```

This is the final one for 554:
```{r}
custom_y <- list(
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 3000), breaks = c(0, 1500, 3000)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1200), breaks = c(0, 600, 1200)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 600), breaks = c(0, 300, 600)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 400), breaks = c(0, 200, 400)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100), breaks = c(0, 50, 100)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 50), breaks = c(0, 25, 50)),  
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), breaks = c(0, 10, 20)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 10), breaks = c(0, 5, 10)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 2), breaks = c(0, 1, 2))
)

## by season
ggplot(hurricane_df6_sum,
       aes(x = storm_intensity, y = total_psite_count, fill = season)) + 
  geom_col() + 
  facet_wrap(~psite_type, labeller = labeller(psite_type = parasite_labels), scales = "free_y") +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "white"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey30"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.2, color = "darkgrey")
  ) +
  ylab("Parasite Count") + 
  xlab("Hurricane Category") + 
  scale_fill_manual(
  values = c("spring" = "#1BB6AF", "summer" = "#EA7580", "fall" = "#F6A1A5", "winter" = "#088BBE"), 
  name = "",
  labels = season_labels) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = storm_labels) +
  facetted_pos_scales(y = custom_y)

## by timing
custom_y_t <- list(
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1400), breaks = c(0, 700, 1400)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1000), breaks = c(0, 500, 1000)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 400), breaks = c(0, 200, 400)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 400), breaks = c(0, 200, 400)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 60), breaks = c(0, 30, 60)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), breaks = c(0, 10, 20)),  
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 12), breaks = c(0, 6, 12)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 4), breaks = c(0, 2, 4)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 2), breaks = c(0, 1, 2))
)

ggplot(hurricane_df6_sum,
       aes(x = storm_intensity, y = total_psite_count, fill = timing)) + 
  geom_col(position = "dodge") + 
  facet_wrap(~ psite_type, labeller = labeller(psite_type = parasite_labels), scales = "free_y") +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "white"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey30"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.2, color = "darkgrey")
  ) +
  ylab("Parasite Count") + 
  xlab("Hurricane Category") + 
  scale_fill_manual(
  values = c("pre" = "#F28A8A", "post" = "#1BB6AF"), 
  name = "",
  labels = season_labels) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = storm_labels) +
  facetted_pos_scales(y = custom_y_t)
```
is before and after diversity different? -- remove intensity of storms
```{r}
## by timing
custom_y_t2 <- list(
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 3200), breaks = c(0, 700, 3200)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 2000), breaks = c(0, 1000, 2000)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1200), breaks = c(0, 600, 1200)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 400), breaks = c(0, 200, 400)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 80), breaks = c(0, 40, 80)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 16), breaks = c(0, 8, 16)),  
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 40), breaks = c(0, 20, 40)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 8), breaks = c(0, 4, 8)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 2), breaks = c(0, 1, 2))
)

ggplot(hurricane_df6_sum,
       aes(x = timing, y = total_psite_count, fill = timing)) + 
  geom_col() + 
  facet_wrap(~ psite_type, labeller = labeller(psite_type = parasite_labels2), scales = "free_y") +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "white"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey30"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.2, color = "darkgrey")
  ) +
  ylab("Parasite Count") + 
  xlab("Timing") + 
  scale_fill_manual(
  values = c("pre" = "#F28A8A", "post" = "#1BB6AF"), 
  name = "",
  labels = season_labels) +
  facetted_pos_scales(y = custom_y_t2)
```



Plot frequency of different storm intensities 
```{r}
view(table(hurricane_df6$storm_intensity))

# total number of storms: cat 5 = 5, cat 4 = 6, cat 3 = 2, cat 2 = 0, cat 1 = 5, ts = 5
```


Create and plot a timeline of hurricane events:
```{r}
# Create a timeline-specific dataframe
timeline_data <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  filter(ewe_type != "no event") %>%  # Exclude rows where there is no event
  mutate(
    start = date, 
    end = case_when(
      ewe_type == "pre_5" ~ date + 180, 
      ewe_type == "post_5" ~ date + 180,
      ewe_type == "pre_4" ~ date + 180, 
      ewe_type == "post_4" ~ date + 180,
      ewe_type == "pre_3" ~ date + 180, 
      ewe_type == "post_3" ~ date + 180,
      ewe_type == "pre_1" ~ date + 180, 
      ewe_type == "post_1" ~ date + 180,
      ewe_type == "pre_ts" ~ date + 180, 
      ewe_type == "post_ts" ~ date + 180,
      TRUE ~ date  # Default case for unknown types
    ),
    event_type = ewe_type  # This will be used as the label for the event
  )

# Plot the timeline using vistime
gg_vistime(timeline_data, 
        col.start = "start", 
        col.end = "end", 
        col.event = "ewe_type", 
        title = "Hurricane Event Timeline") 


```


### More plots

Prelim plots, hurricane only
```{r}
ggplot(hurricane_df6,
       aes(x = psite_abundance, y = psite_prevalence)) + 
         geom_point() + facet_wrap(~timing) +
   theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
         panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, 
                                         color = "darkgrey"),
         panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
         panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
         panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
         panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines")) +
  ylab("") + 
  xlab("")
```

More prelim plots
```{r}
ggplot(hurricane_df6,
       aes(x = storm_intensity, y = mean_streamflow)) + 
         geom_boxplot() + 
   theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
         panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, 
                                         color = "darkgrey"),
         panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
         panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
         panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
         panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines")) +
  ylab("") + 
  xlab("")

ggplot(hurricane_df6,
       aes(x = ewe_type, y = psite_count)) + 
         geom_col() + 
   theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
         panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, 
                                         color = "darkgrey"),
         panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
         panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
         panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
         panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines")) +
  ylab("") + 
  xlab("")

ggplot(hurricane_df6,
       aes(x = ewe_type, y = mean_streamflow)) + 
         geom_boxplot() + 
   theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
         panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, 
                                         color = "darkgrey"),
         panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
         panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
         panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
         panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines")) +
  ylab("") + 
  xlab("")


ggplot(hurricane_df6,
       aes(x = ewe_type, y = mean_temperature, fill = season)) + 
  geom_boxplot() + 
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "darkgrey"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines")
  ) +
  ylab("") + 
  xlab("") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal[1:5], name = '')

ggplot(hurricane_df6,
       aes(x = psite_count)) + 
         geom_histogram() + 
   theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
         panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, 
                                         color = "darkgrey"),
         panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
         panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
         panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
         panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines")) +
  ylab("") + 
  xlab("")


```

Prelim plots, drought and flood only
```{r}
facet_labels2 <- c(
  "drought" = "Drought",
  "flood" = "Flood"
)

ggplot(drought_flood_df,
       aes(x = season, y = psite_abundance, fill = ewe_type)) + 
  geom_boxplot() + facet_wrap(~ci) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "darkgrey"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines")
  ) +
  ylab("Parasite Abundance") + 
  xlab("Collection Date") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal[1:5], name = '')
```

more plots 
```{r}

# remove non-comparable sites:
hdf_pp <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  filter(site != "CD",
         site != "CC", 
         site != "IB")

z <- ggplot(hdf_pp,
       aes(x = timing, y = mean_temperature, fill = timing)) + 
  geom_boxplot() + facet_grid(.~site) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "grey99"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"), 
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank()
  ) +
  ylab("Mean Temperature (C)") + 
  xlab("Pre or Post Hurricane") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal[1:4], name = '', labels = pp_label)

x <- ggplot(hdf_pp,
       aes(x = timing, y = mean_streamflow, fill = timing)) + 
  geom_boxplot() + facet_grid(.~site) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "grey99"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"), 
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank()
  ) +
 ylab("Mean Streamflow (m³/s)") + 
  xlab("") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal[1:4], name = '', labels = pp_label) 

zx <- ggarrange(z, x, common.legend = TRUE, legend = "bottom", labels = c("A", "B"), align = "v", ncol = 1)

print(zx)

```



## Model
drought flood - count
```{r}
# summary(drfl_1 <- glmmTMB(psite_count ~ ewe_type + (1|catalog_number/site) + (1|season) + (1|year_collected) + (1|psite_type/fish_sp_y), data = drought_flood_df_clean_noci, family = "nbinom1"))

# drought and flood against control together
summary(drfl_1 <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ ewe_type + (1|catalog_number) + (1|season) + (1|year_collected) + (1|psite_type/fish_sp_y), 
                          data = drought_flood_df, family = "nbinom1"))

# just droughts vs. control
summary(d_1 <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ ewe_type + (1|catalog_number) + (1|season) + (1|year_collected) + (1|psite_type/fish_sp_y), 
                          data = ddf, family = "nbinom1"))

# just floods vs. control
summary(f_1 <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ ewe_type + (1|catalog_number) + (1|season) + (1|year_collected) + (1|psite_type/fish_sp_y), 
                          data = fdf, family = "nbinom1"))



### this is the main one:
# trying with the new code and model - same as hurricane
summary(df_count <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing + (1|ci/catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_y/psite_type), 
                          data = drought_flood_df, family = "nbinom1"))

summary(df_count <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing + (1|ci/catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_y/psite_type), 
                          data = drought_flood_df, family = nbinom1(link = "sqrt"))) 

summary(df_count <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing + (1|ci/catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_y/psite_type), 
                          data = drought_flood_df, family = nbinom2(link = "sqrt"))) 

summary(df_count <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing + (1|ci/catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_y/psite_type), 
                          data = drought_flood_df, family = nbinom2(link = "log")))

# diagnostics
#Evaluate residuals
s_df = simulateResiduals(fittedModel = df_count, n = 250)
s_df$scaledResiduals
plot(s_df)

```

drought flood - prevalence
```{r}
# drought and flood against control together
summary(drfl_2 <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ ewe_type + (1|catalog_number) + (1|season) + (1|year_collected) + (1|psite_type/fish_sp_y), 
                          data = drought_flood_df, family = "binomial"))

# just droughts vs. control
summary(d_2 <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ ewe_type + (1|catalog_number) + (1|season) + (1|year_collected) + (1|psite_type/fish_sp_y), 
                          data = ddf, family = "nbinom1"))

# just floods vs. control
summary(f_2 <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ ewe_type + (1|catalog_number) + (1|season) + (1|year_collected) + (1|psite_type/fish_sp_y), 
                          data = fdf, family = "nbinom1"))
```


hurricane model - count (abundance)
```{r}
# summary(hurricane_count <- glmmTMB(psite_count ~ ewe_type + control + ci + (1|storm_intensity) + (1|catalog_number/site) + (1|season) + (1|year_collected) + (1|psite_type/fish_sp_y), data = hurricane_df6, family = "nbinom1"))


summary(hurricane_count <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing + (1|ci/catalog_number) + (1|storm_intensity) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_y/psite_type), 
                          data = hurricane_df6, family = "nbinom1")) 

summary(hurricane_count <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing + (1|ci/catalog_number) + (1|storm_intensity) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_y/psite_type), 
                          data = hurricane_df6, family = nbinom1(link="sqrt")))

summary(hurricane_count <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing + (1|ci/catalog_number) + (1|storm_intensity) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_y/psite_type), 
                          data = hurricane_df6, family = nbinom2(link="sqrt"))) 

summary(hurricane_count <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing + (1|ci/catalog_number) + (1|storm_intensity) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_y/psite_type), 
                          data = hurricane_df6, family = nbinom2(link="log"))) 

# diagnostics
#Evaluate residuals
s = simulateResiduals(fittedModel = hurricane_count, n = 250)
s$scaledResiduals
plot(s)

```

hurricane model - prevalence
```{r}
summary(hurricane_prevalence <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ ewe_type + ci + (1|storm_intensity) + (1|catalog_number/site) + (1|season) + (1|year_collected) + (1|psite_type/fish_sp_y), 
                          data = hurricane_df6, family = binomial))
```


# QUESTIONS
 Why does it seem like the pearl river is not being affected by floods and droughts?
 Why are pearl river parasites not reacting at all to flood and drought conditions in the river?
